I love destroying reptiles! Puzzles add to the mix, but it's the way you destroy reptiles is so GREAT!

developer_response.body:
Haha, that’s awesome! 😄 

So glad you’re having fun smashing those reptiles! 💥 We put a lot of love into making every hit feel just right — and yeah, those puzzles are there to keep your brain flexing between battles. 

Thanks for playing Smash The Reptiles! 🦎🔥

reviews.review_title: Easy to get used to smashing reptiles
reviews.review_description: The best part is when their heads fly:D
The combat is brutal but fun, and the style makes it stand out. It’s a bit short, but definitely worth playing if you want a pure adrenaline hit!! 😍😍😍

developer_response.body:
Hey! 

Awesome to hear you had a blast! That wild, high-adrenaline feel is exactly what we were going for 😎🔥 Glad you dug the style too — we’ve got more cool stuff coming soon. 

Thanks for playing Smash The Reptiles! 🦎⚔️
